en: They set out from Elim, and all the congregation of the people of Israel came to the wilderness of Sin, which is between Elim and Sinai, on the fifteenth day of the second month after they had departed from the land of Egypt.
zh: 以色列全體會眾從以琳起行，在出埃及以後第二個月十五日，來到以琳和西奈中間汛的曠野那裡。

en: And the whole congregation of the people of Israel grumbled against Moses and Aaron in the wilderness,
zh: 以色列全體會眾在曠野都向摩西和亞倫發怨言；

en: and the people of Israel said to them, "Would that we had died by the hand of the LORD in the land of Egypt, when we sat by the meat pots and ate bread to the full, for you have brought us out into this wilderness to kill this whole assembly with hunger."
zh: 以色列人對他們說：“我們寧願在埃及地坐在肉鍋旁邊，吃飯吃到飽的時候，死在耶和華的手裡！你們倒把我們領出來，到這曠野，是要叫這全體會眾餓死啊！”

en: Then the LORD said to Moses, "Behold, I am about to rain bread from heaven for you, and the people shall go out and gather a day's portion every day, that I may test them, whether they will walk in my law or not.
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“看哪，我要把糧食從天上降給你們；人民可以出去，每天收取當天的分量，我好試驗他們是否遵行我的律法。

en: On the sixth day, when they prepare what they bring in, it will be twice as much as they gather daily."
zh: 到第六天，他們把收進來的預備好，比每天收取的多一倍。”

en: So Moses and Aaron said to all the people of Israel, "At evening you shall know that it was the LORD who brought you out of the land of Egypt,
zh: 摩西和亞倫對以色列眾人說：“今晚你們必定知道是耶和華把你們從埃及地領出來。

en: and in the morning you shall see the glory of the LORD, because he has heard your grumbling against the LORD. For what are we, that you grumble against us?"
zh: 明早你們必定看見耶和華的榮耀，因為耶和華聽見了你們向他所發的怨言了。我們算甚麼，你們竟向我們發怨言呢？”

en: And Moses said, "When the LORD gives you in the evening meat to eat and in the morning bread to the full, because the LORD has heard your grumbling that you grumble against him- what are we? Your grumbling is not against us but against the LORD."
zh: 摩西又說：“耶和華晚上必給你們肉吃，早晨必給你們食物吃飽，因為耶和華聽見了你們埋怨他所說的怨言了。我們算甚麼？你們的怨言不是向我們發的，而是向耶和華發的。”

en: Then Moses said to Aaron, "Say to the whole congregation of the people of Israel, 'Come near before the LORD, for he has heard your grumbling.'"
zh: 摩西對亞倫說：“你要對以色列全體會眾說：‘你們走近耶和華面前，因為他已經聽見了你們的怨言了。’”

en: And as soon as Aaron spoke to the whole congregation of the people of Israel, they looked toward the wilderness, and behold, the glory of the LORD appeared in the cloud.
zh: 亞倫對以色列全體會眾說話的時候，他們向著曠野觀望，看見耶和華的榮耀在雲中顯現出來。

en: And the LORD said to Moses,
zh: 耶和華吩咐摩西說：

en: "I have heard the grumbling of the people of Israel. Say to them, 'At twilight you shall eat meat, and in the morning you shall be filled with bread. Then you shall know that I am the LORD your God.'"
zh: “以色列人的怨言，我已經聽見了。你告訴他們說：‘黃昏的時候你們必吃肉，早晨的時候必有食物吃飽；這樣，你們就知道我耶和華是你們的 神了。’”

en: In the evening quail came up and covered the camp, and in the morning dew lay around the camp.
zh: 到了晚上，有鵪鶉飛上來，把營都遮蓋了；到了早晨，營的四周有一層露水。

en: And when the dew had gone up, there was on the face of the wilderness a fine, flake-like thing, fine as frost on the ground.
zh: 露水上升以後，就見野地上有細小鱗狀的東西，像小白霜一樣細小的東西。

en: When the people of Israel saw it, they said to one another, "What is it?" For they did not know what it was. And Moses said to them, "It is the bread that the LORD has given you to eat.
zh: 以色列人看見了，就彼此對問說：“這是甚麼？”原來他們不知道那是甚麼。摩西對他們說：“這就是耶和華賜給你們吃的食物。

en: This is what the LORD has commanded: 'Gather of it, each one of you, as much as he can eat. You shall each take an omer, according to the number of the persons that each of you has in his tent.'"
zh: 耶和華吩咐的話是這樣的：‘你們要按著各人的食量收取，按著你們的人數為帳幕裡的人收取，一人兩公升。’”

en: And the people of Israel did so. They gathered, some more, some less.
zh: 以色列人就這樣行了；有的多收、有的少收。

en: But when they measured it with an omer, whoever gathered much had nothing left over, and whoever gathered little had no lack. Each of them gathered as much as he could eat.
zh: 他們用升斗衡量的時候，多收的沒有剩餘，少收的也不缺乏；各人按著自己的食量收取。

en: And Moses said to them, "Let no one leave any of it over till the morning."
zh: 摩西對他們說：“誰也不可把一些留到早晨。”

en: But they did not listen to Moses. Some left part of it till the morning, and it bred worms and stank. And Moses was angry with them.
zh: 他們卻不聽摩西的話，有人把一些留到早晨，就生蟲發臭了。摩西就向他們發怒。

en: Morning by morning they gathered it, each as much as he could eat; but when the sun grew hot, it melted.
zh: 他們每天早晨都按著各人的食量去收取；太陽一發熱，就融化了。

en: On the sixth day they gathered twice as much bread, two omers each. And when all the leaders of the congregation came and told Moses,
zh: 到第六日，他們收取了兩倍的食物，每人四公升；會眾的首領都來告訴摩西。

en: he said to them, "This is what the LORD has commanded: 'Tomorrow is a day of solemn rest, a holy Sabbath to the LORD; bake what you will bake and boil what you will boil, and all that is left over lay aside to be kept till the morning.'"
zh: 摩西對他們說：“耶和華這樣說：‘明天是安息日，是向耶和華守的聖安息日。你們要烤的，就烤吧；要煮的，就煮吧；所有餘剩的要自己保存著，直留到早晨。’”

en: So they laid it aside till the morning, as Moses commanded them, and it did not stink, and there were no worms in it.
zh: 他們就照著摩西吩咐的，把餘剩的留到早晨；竟然不發臭，裡頭也沒有生蟲。

en: Moses said, "Eat it today, for today is a Sabbath to the LORD; today you will not find it in the field.
zh: 摩西說：“今天吃這個吧，因為今天是向耶和華守的安息日，今日你們在田野裡必找不著。

en: Six days you shall gather it, but on the seventh day, which is a Sabbath, there will be none."
zh: 六天你們可以收取，但第七天是安息日，在那一天甚麼都沒有了。”

en: On the seventh day some of the people went out to gather, but they found none.
zh: 第七天民間有人出去收取，可是甚麼也找不著。

en: And the LORD said to Moses, "How long will you refuse to keep my commandments and my laws?
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“你們拒絕遵守我的誡命和律法，要到幾時呢？

en: See! The LORD has given you the Sabbath; therefore on the sixth day he gives you bread for two days. Remain each of you in his place; let no one go out of his place on the seventh day."
zh: 你們看，耶和華把安息日賜給了你們，所以第六日他賜給你們兩天的食物；第七天你們各人要住在家裡，誰都不可離開自己的地方。”

en: So the people rested on the seventh day.
zh: 於是人民在第七天都安息了。

en: Now the house of Israel called its name manna. It was like coriander seed, white, and the taste of it was like wafers made with honey.
zh: 以色列家給這食物起名叫“嗎哪”，它像芫荽的種子，色白，味道像攙蜜的薄餅。

en: Moses said, "This is what the LORD has commanded: 'Let an omer of it be kept throughout your generations, so that they may see the bread with which I fed you in the wilderness, when I brought you out of the land of Egypt.'"
zh: 摩西說：“耶和華吩咐的話是這樣：要把滿兩公升的嗎哪保留起來給你們的後代，好讓他們可以看見當日我把你們從埃及地領出來的時候，在曠野給你們吃的食物。”

en: And Moses said to Aaron, "Take a jar, and put an omer of manna in it, and place it before the LORD to be kept throughout your generations."
zh: 摩西對亞倫說：“拿一個罐子來，裝滿兩公升嗎哪，存放在耶和華面前，保留起來給你們的後代。”

en: As the LORD commanded Moses, so Aaron placed it before the testimony to be kept.
zh: 亞倫就照著耶和華吩咐摩西的，把嗎哪存留在法櫃前。

en: The people of Israel ate the manna forty years, till they came to a habitable land. They ate the manna till they came to the border of the land of Canaan.
zh: 以色列人吃嗎哪共四十年，直到進了有人居住的地方為止；他們吃嗎哪，直到進入迦南地的邊界為止。

en: (An omer is the tenth part of an ephah.)
zh: 兩公升就是當時的標準量器的十分之一。
